title: UML Models Supplementing the Use Case Diagram
description: A hierarchical diagram showing the core Use Case model and the supplementary UML models that provide further detail, context, and implementation specifics.
relationships: Use Case Diagram is elaborated by Activity & Sequence Diagrams
Use Case realizations are detailed by Communication Diagrams
System states are modeled by State Machine Diagrams
Structural elements are defined by the Class Diagram
